description: CompositionPurple round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and chest printFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Remove promptly and line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery It is time to let your t-shirt speak for you. Intimidate the creep who stares at you for no reason. Show him you care two hoots with this 'Whatever' tee from tantra. Team it with white shorts and floaters for a great casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6'; Chest-37"; Waist-32"
